mapper.select: SELECT g.id, g.user_id AS userId, g.name, g.phone_num AS phoneNum, g.description, g.address, g.address_detail AS addressDetail, g.postcode, g.latitude, g.longitude, g.file, g.facility, g.background_img AS backgroundImg, g.br_file AS brFile, u.email AS emailId, u.name AS userName, u.phone, u.profile_image AS profileImg FROM GYM g JOIN `USER` u ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE g.id = #{gymId}
mapper.update: UPDATE GYM SET name = #{name}, phone_num = #{phoneNum}, description = #{description}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, postcode = #{postcode}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, facility = #{facility}, file = #{file}, background_img = #{backgroundImg}, br_file = #{brFile} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `USER` SET email = #{email}, name = #{name}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS gsNum, gym_id AS gymNum, available_weekday_start AS availableWeekdayStart, available_weekday_end AS availableWeekdayEnd, available_weekend_start AS availableWeekendStart, available_weekend_end AS availableWeekendEnd FROM GYM_SCHEDULE WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}
mapper.update: UPDATE GYM_SCHEDULE SET available_weekday_start = #{availableWeekdayStart}, available_weekday_end = #{availableWeekdayEnd}, available_weekend_start = #{availableWeekendStart}, available_weekend_end = #{availableWeekendEnd} WHERE gym_id = #{gymNum}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS membershipNum, gym_id AS gymNum, type, type_rep AS typeRep, price FROM MEMBERSHIP WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERSHIP ( gym_id, trainer_id, type, type_rep, price ) VALUES ( #{gymNum}, NULL, #{type}, #{typeRep}, #{price} )
